name: roster-critical
_roster_phase1_note: Linear approximation only. The critical pipeline has an optional question phase and branching formal-verification steps (roster-spec-formal, roster-formal-verify). This template covers only the post-plan linear path. Manual intervention is required for formal-verification steps.
_doc: Critical mode template (Phase 1 linear approximation, post-plan phases): implement → review → qa → ship.

steps.prompt: Execute /roster-implement for task ${TASK}. Read briefs/${TASK}-implementer.md as your sole input. If a pre-hook exists, run: TASK=${TASK} node dist/scripts/run-hook.js pre roster-implement before starting. After completion, run: TASK=${TASK} node dist/scripts/run-hook.js post roster-implement.

Execute /roster-review for task ${TASK}. Read briefs/${TASK}-reviewer.md. If a pre-hook exists, run: TASK=${TASK} node dist/scripts/run-hook.js pre roster-review before starting. After completion, run: TASK=${TASK} node dist/scripts/run-hook.js post roster-review.

Execute /roster-qa for task ${TASK}. Read briefs/${TASK}-qa-scope.md. If a pre-hook exists, run: TASK=${TASK} node dist/scripts/run-hook.js pre roster-qa before starting. After completion, run: TASK=${TASK} node dist/scripts/run-hook.js post roster-qa.

Execute /roster-ship for task ${TASK}. If a pre-hook exists, run: TASK=${TASK} node dist/scripts/run-hook.js pre roster-ship before starting. After completion, run: TASK=${TASK} node dist/scripts/run-hook.js post roster-ship.
